title: Diamond Multi-Purpose Saw Blades 3Pcs, 115mm/4.5" Angle Grinder Discs, Tile Cutting Disc, Grinder Tool Dry/Wet Cutting for Concrete, Steel, PVC, Granite, Marble, Wood
features: 【Premium Diamond Cutting Performance】This multi-purpose diamond saw blade is made with high-quality diamond grit, delivering sharper and smoother cuts on marble, tiles, concrete, steel, PVC and wood. Designed for long-lasting cutting performance without chipping or blade damage.

【Ultra-Thin & Lightweight Design】Featuring a 1.4 mm ultra-thin, light-duty segmented design with ventilation holes, this diamond blade reduces vibration, improves control and allows faster entry into the cut. Ideal for enhanced cutting speed and precision for both professionals and DIY users working on detailed projects.

【Durable Brazed Construction】This 115 mm / 4.5-inch diamond combination blade is manufactured using advanced brazing technology to ensure excellent toughness, prevent segment loss and provide consistent heavy-duty strength. Suitable for long-term use in professional job sites and DIY cutting applications.

【Efficient Heat Dissipation】The segmented design with multiple cooling holes helps expel debris efficiently and reduce heat build-up. Ensures stable, high-speed performance when cutting demanding materials such as tiles, concrete, steel and PVC pipes.

【Wide Tool Compatibility】Compatible with most angle grinders and marble cutting machines, this multi-purpose diamond blade is highly versatile. Ideal for tile installers, stonemasons, metalworkers, plumbers and home DIY enthusiasts.
